visual: Drops into a very low side stance with one leg fully extended flat along the floor and hand sweeping along the inside of that leg — the creeping portion isolated from the rooster.
motion_description: From an upright, narrow stance with arms raised near the head, the left foot steps far sideways as the right leg bends deeply, lowering the center of gravity while the torso leans forward and pivots slightly left. The left hand arcs smoothly downward to sweep along the inside of the fully extended left leg, while the right arm circles backward and upward, pausing slightly in a hook shape behind the body. In a continuous, steady flow, the weight slowly shifts forward onto the left leg to raise the torso into a front lunge, finishing with the left arm extended straight ahead at shoulder height.
